response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of distributed systems or cloud compute leadership, and they have no documented technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Only 1–2 years of C++ exposure (LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
